subject: [PATCH v2 3/7] mm: list_lru: move list dead check to lock_list_lru_of_memcg()

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Reviewed the patch and noted that a comment about reparenting is already present in the code. Provided a Reviewed-by tag.

2026-03-12.patch_summary: This patch moves the list dead check from lock_list_lru() to its caller, specifically in the MEMCG variant of lock_list_lru(). This change is part of a series aimed at unifying the lock_list_lru() variants. The patch author argues that only the MEMCG variant needs to check for races with cgroup deletion and list reparenting.
